personas.name: Kaito Mori
weaknesses: needs help turning feedback into action order
personas.background: Started in infrastructure operations and support, with one year of hands-on experience in server monitoring, incident response, and routine operations. Has not studied SAP yet and is transitioning toward application engineering work.

domain_context.notes: Needs fundamentals first: SAP landscape, terminology, transactions, transports, ABAP basics, and operational workflows.
